style_a.name: 灰暗现实主义
style_a.prompt_suffix: handheld camera, film grain, desaturated cold tones, blue-grey color palette, urban isolation, dimly lit

style_b.name: 东方赛博神话
style_b.prompt_suffix: epic cyber mythology, golden and neon blue palette, weightless atmosphere, digital particles, majestic scale

music_sync.lyrics: X-WOW! X-WOW! 凡人不凡 一拳打碎天花板 / X-WOW! X-WOW! 代码为剑 劈开命运的高山

atmosphere.overall_mood: 副歌爆发！最高能量段——一拳击碎天花板、代码为剑劈山，全MV的能量巅峰
atmosphere.lighting: 金色爆发光 + 红色冲击波

video_prompt: Epic chorus explosion: golden cyber-armored warrior punching through a cosmic ceiling shattering it, then wielding a code sword slashing through a mountain, maximum energy, iconic poses, 16:9, 15s.

bgm.description: 副歌全力爆发，最高能量密度，重型节拍 + 全乐器齐奏
bgm.instruments: 全乐器齐奏、人声高亢、重型鼓组

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 金甲战士全速冲向头顶的巨大透明天花板——一面写满限制性代码的屏障

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 向上冲锋，拳头高举直指天花板

storyboard_9grid.sfx: 冲锋呐喊 + 气流破裂声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A golden cyber-armored warrior charging upward at full speed toward a massive transparent ceiling barrier covered in red restrictive code, fist raised, upward rushing motion, golden flame trail below, dramatic upward angle, the barrier looming enormous above, epic charge scene, cyber mythology, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 拳头撞击天花板的瞬间——时间仿佛静止，冲击波从接触点向四面八方扩散

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 拳头击中天花板的瞬间定格

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 时间冻结的一击——全MV最震撼画面
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Freeze-frame impact moment: a golden armored fist striking a massive transparent barrier, circular shockwave expanding from the point of impact, cracks radiating outward, time frozen, golden energy explosion at contact point, extreme dramatic close-up from below, epic impact, cyber mythology, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 天花板在拳头下彻底碎裂！巨大的碎片向四面八方飞散，金色光芒从裂口涌入

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 拳头穿透天花板，继续向上冲

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 天花板碎了！——限制被打破
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 玻璃碎裂的华丽声效 + 胜利的管弦乐
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A massive transparent ceiling barrier shattering spectacularly under a golden armored punch, enormous fragments flying in all directions catching golden light, the warrior bursting through upward, brilliant golden light flooding through the breach, debris field, epic destruction, triumphant breakthrough, cyber mythology, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 穿过碎裂的天花板后，战士在更高层空间悬停——手中凝聚出一把金色代码之剑

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 悬浮，右手握住正在凝聚的金色光剑

transition.description: 天花板碎片仍在身后飘落

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 新武器锻造——代码即为剑
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A golden cyber-armored warrior hovering above shattered barrier debris, materializing a gleaming golden code sword in their right hand from swirling data particles, the blade inscribed with flowing code, fragments still falling in the background, dramatic pause before the next strike, cyber mythology, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 远处，一座巨大的数字高山矗立——表面布满了「996」「内卷」「35岁」等文字

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 握剑面对高山，蓄力姿态

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 命运之山——一切不公的具象化
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 高山的压迫性低频嗡鸣
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A colossal dark-red digital mountain towering in digital space, its surface covered with ominous glowing text showing '996', '内卷', '35岁', a tiny golden armored warrior standing before it holding a code sword ready to strike, extreme scale contrast, oppressive mountain versus determined warrior, cyber mythology, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 战士跃起，挥剑从山顶到山脚划出一道金色弧线

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 腾空跃起，以无比速度从上至下挥剑劈向高山

storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A golden armored warrior leaping high and slashing downward with a blazing golden code sword, cutting a massive arc of golden light from top to bottom of a colossal dark mountain, extreme dynamic motion, speed lines, the golden slash bisecting the mountain, epic action pose, side tracking shot, cyber mythology, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 高山从斩痕处缓缓裂开——金色光芒从裂缝中喷涌而出
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 命运之山被劈开——金光从裂缝中爆发
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 山体崩裂的轰鸣声 + 金色能量喷涌声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A colossal mountain splitting apart along a clean golden slash line, brilliant golden light erupting from the widening crack, the two halves slowly separating, golden energy pouring out like lava, a small armored warrior standing at the base with sword lowered, epic destructive beauty, cyber mythology, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 山体彻底崩塌——碎片化为金色粒子消散，在废墟中显现出巨大的X徽标

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 站在废墟前，X徽标在身后闪耀

transition.description: 山体碎片化为粒子→X徽标显现

storyboard_9grid.sfx: 碎裂声渐弱 + X徽标点亮的能量声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: The remnants of a shattered mountain dissolving into golden particles, revealing a massive glowing X-WOW logo formed from golden light in the center of the destruction, the armored warrior standing in front of it, triumphant scene, golden particles floating upward like fireflies, epic victory moment, cyber mythology, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 战士面对镜头，金色代码之剑搭在肩上，X徽标在背后如太阳般闪耀——标志性pose

characters.name: 程序员
characters.action: 代码之剑搭肩，微微侧头看向镜头

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: MV的标志性画面——可以做海报的一帧
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 能量持续嗡鸣 + 风声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Iconic hero pose: a golden cyber-armored warrior with golden code sword resting on shoulder, looking toward camera with a confident slight smile, a massive glowing X-WOW emblem blazing like a sun behind them, heroic low angle, golden particles drifting, poster-perfect composition, dramatic backlighting, cyber mythology, 16:9 aspect ratio
